message:
✨ Sidebar UX improvements: resizable width, aligned counts, slogan, setup guide modal (#1935)

- Add resizable sidebar with drag handle (180px–480px, persisted)
- Align card count badges and keep them visible on hover
- Remove name truncation/ellipsis to show full dashboard names
- Add "multi-cluster first, saving time and tokens" slogan under logo
- Full setup guide now opens SetupInstructionsDialog modal (was 404)
- Move Recommended Dashboards from Add Cards modal to Customize Sidebar
- Rename "Explore Dashboards" to "Explore More Dashboards" and link to Customize Sidebar

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
